goal: exists(k0: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](k0) = n and all_prime(k0) }
exists(k0: List[Nat]) { k0 = factors and product[Nat](k0) = n and all_prime(k0) and forall(x0: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x0) = n and all_prime(x0) implies is_permutation[Nat](k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: List[Nat]) { not (x0 = factors and product[Nat](x0) = n and all_prime(x0) and forall(x1: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x1) != n or not all_prime(x1) or is_permutation[Nat](x0, x1) }) }(factors)

function(x0: List[Nat]) { not forall(x1: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x1) != n or not all_prime(x1) or is_permutation[Nat](x0, x1) } or not (x0 = factors and product[Nat](x0) = n and all_prime(x0)) }(factors)

function(x0: List[Nat]) { not forall(x1: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x1) != n or not all_prime(x1) or is_permutation[Nat](x0, x1) } or not (x0 = factors and product[Nat](x0) = n) or not all_prime(x0) }(factors)

function(x0: List[Nat]) { not forall(x1: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x1) != n or not all_prime(x1) or is_permutation[Nat](x0, x1) } or product[Nat](x0) != n or not all_prime(x0) or factors != x0 }(factors)
let w0: List[Nat] satisfy { product[Nat](w0) = n and all_prime(w0) and not is_permutation[Nat](factors, w0) }
function(x0: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x0) != n or not all_prime(x0) or is_permutation[Nat](factors, x0) }(w0)

let w0: List[Nat] satisfy { exists(k0: List[Nat]) { k0 = w0 and product[Nat](k0) = n and all_prime(k0) and forall(x0: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x0) != n or not all_prime(x0) or is_permutation[Nat](k0, x0) } } }
let w1: List[Nat] satisfy { w1 = w0 and product[Nat](w1) = n and all_prime(w1) and forall(x1: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x1) != n or not all_prime(x1) or is_permutation[Nat](w1, x1) } }
let w2: List[Nat] satisfy { w2 = w0 and product[Nat](w2) = n and all_prime(w2) and forall(x2: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x2) != n or not all_prime(x2) or is_permutation[Nat](w2, x2) } }
function(x0: List[Nat]) { not (product[Nat](x0) = n and all_prime(x0) and forall(x1: List[Nat]) { product[Nat](x1) != n or not all_prime(x1) or is_permutation[Nat](x0, x1) }) }(w2)
